news.title: 隔夜美股收高，科技股领涨
news.summary: 美股三大指数隔夜集体上涨，纳斯达克指数涨幅超过1%，科技股表现强劲。市场关注美联储政策动向和通胀数据。

news.title: 亚洲市场早盘观望情绪浓厚
news.summary: 亚洲市场今日早盘开盘平稳，投资者关注中国一季度经济数据和日本央行政策会议。A50期货小幅上涨。

news.title: 大宗商品价格震荡
news.summary: 原油价格在隔夜交易中震荡，黄金价格持稳。市场关注中东局势和美元走势对大宗商品的影响。

news.title: Fed nominee Warsh filings detail vast wealth, far exceeding past chairs
news.summary: Kevin Warsh, nominee to lead the Federal Reserve, detailed his holdings in newly released financial disclosures.

news.title: Wholesale prices rose 0.5% in March, much less than expected despite war impact
news.summary: The producer price index was expected to increase 1.1% in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus estimate.
